moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages Underway
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in full swing, with the Round of 16 matches currently being played today and tomorrow, leading into the Quarter-finals later this week.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is heating up! We're deep into the knockout stages with the Round of 16 happening today and tomorrow. Who are you backing for Quarter-final glory?

angles.name: UK Fan Angle
angles.copy: Are you glued to the World Cup action? With the Round of 16 underway, the tension is building. Any surprise teams you're tipping to go all the way?

moments.title: Wimbledon Second Week Action
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon 2026 continues into its second week at the All England Club, with Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Fourth Round matches scheduled for today and tomorrow, leading to the Quarter-finals on Tuesday and Wednesday.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon's second week is in full swing with the Fourth Round today. Who's serving up a storm and heading for the Quarter-finals?

angles.name: London Local Angle
angles.copy: The buzz around SW19 is immense! Wimbledon continues today with Fourth Round clashes. Who are you hoping to see in the Quarter-finals this week?

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France began yesterday, July 4th, in Barcelona, Spain, and will continue until July 26th, with early stages underway this week.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: Allez! The Tour de France is off and cycling! Stage 2 is happening today, July 5th. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey this year?

angles.name: Cycling Enthusiast Angle
angles.copy: The Grande Boucle is back! The Tour de France started yesterday in Barcelona, and the peloton is already tackling the early stages. Catch all the action as it unfolds!

moments.title: Lytham Festival Concludes Today
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, a major music event on the Lancashire coast, concludes its 2026 edition today, July 5th, after five days of diverse performances.

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: It's the final day of Lytham Festival 2026! If you're there, soak up those last vibes. What's been your highlight from the Lancashire coast this weekend?

angles.name: Local Shoutout
angles.copy: Closing out a fantastic five days! Lytham Festival wraps up today. Hope everyone had an incredible time on the Fylde coast!

moments.title: GuilFest Finishes Today
moments.blurb: GuilFest, the independent music and arts festival in Stoke Park, Guildford, concludes its two-day run today, July 5th, with a lineup featuring Sophie Ellis-Bextor and more.

angles.name: Festival Wrap Up
angles.copy: That's a wrap for GuilFest 2026! The two-day music and arts festival at Stoke Park finishes today. What were your favourite acts?

angles.name: Local Vibe
angles.copy: Guildford's been buzzing this weekend! GuilFest draws to a close today. Share your best moments from Stoke Park!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is well underway, airing Sunday to Friday at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily villa drama from Mallorca.

angles.name: Daily Dose of Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupling up, and who's heading for the fire pit? Tune in at 9pm!

angles.name: Mid-Series Chatter
angles.copy: Love Island UK is well into its stride. Are your favourite Islanders still going strong, or has a bombshell shaken things up? Let us know your villa predictions!

moments.title: UK Weather Divide: Heat in South, Rain North
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a weather split this week, with hot and very warm conditions expected in Southern and Central England, while the North and Scotland are seeing more unsettled weather and rain.

angles.name: Heatwave South
angles.copy: Sun's out, heat's on! Southern and Central England are in for a very warm week. Stay hydrated and enjoy the sunshine!

angles.name: North Rain
angles.copy: Grab your brollies! It's a wetter picture in the North and Scotland this week. Staying cosy indoors? Let us know what you're up to!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays have officially begun in Northern Ireland (July 1st) and are starting or imminent across other parts of the UK, marking the start of the main holiday season.

angles.name: Holiday Kick-off
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Well, for many across the UK, at least. What are your big plans for the summer holidays?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here! Whether you're staying local or heading off, we hope you have a fantastic time with the family. What's first on your summer activity list?

moments.title: Latest Official Singles Chart Top 40
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 40, published July 2nd, sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holding the top spot, with Olivia Rodrigo and Michael Jackson also in the top 3.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Still at No.1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' leads the Official Singles Chart. Shout out your favourite tracks in the Top 40!

angles.name: New Entries & Movers
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo and Michael Jackson are still making waves in the Top 3 of the latest Official Singles Chart. What are you streaming this week?

moments.title: Happy 76th Birthday, Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Today, July 5th, marks the 76th birthday of American musician Huey Lewis, known for his work with Huey Lewis and the News and hits like 'The Power of Love'.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis today! What's your all-time favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's Huey Lewis's 76th birthday! From 'The Power of Love' to 'Heart and Soul', his songs defined an era. Celebrate with your top pick!

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Marc Cohn
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Marc Cohn, best known for his Grammy-winning hit 'Walking in Memphis', celebrates his 67th birthday today, July 5th.

angles.name: Folk Gem
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the incredible Marc Cohn! 'Walking in Memphis' is a timeless classic. What's your favourite lyric?

angles.name: Singer-Songwriter Shoutout
angles.copy: Celebrating Marc Cohn's 67th birthday today! His songwriting has touched so many. Which of his songs resonates most with you?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, RZA
moments.blurb: Robert Fitzgerald Diggs, better known as RZA, the influential rapper and producer from Wu-Tang Clan, turns 57 today, July 5th.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA! A true pioneer of hip hop and a driving force behind Wu-Tang Clan. What's your favourite RZA-produced track?

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Celebrating RZA's 57th birthday today! His impact on music is undeniable. Drop your favourite Wu-Tang Clan anthem!

moments.title: Happy 53rd Birthday, Joe
moments.blurb: R&B singer and record producer Joe (Joseph Lewis Thomas), known for hits like 'I Wanna Know', celebrates his 53rd birthday today, July 5th.

angles.name: R&B Smoothness
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 53rd Birthday to the smooth R&B sensation, Joe! 'I Wanna Know' is still a classic. What's your go-to Joe track?

angles.name: Love Song King
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Joe! The R&B crooner turns 53 today. His ballads have soundtracked so many moments. Which one is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday, Jason Wade
moments.blurb: Jason Wade, the lead singer and songwriter for the multi-platinum rock band Lifehouse, celebrates his 46th birthday today, July 5th.

angles.name: Rock Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Jason Wade of Lifehouse! From 'Hanging by a Moment' to 'You and Me', his voice defined a generation. What's your top Lifehouse song?

angles.name: Lifehouse Love
angles.copy: Celebrating Jason Wade's birthday today! The Lifehouse frontman turns 46. Which of their anthems takes you back?

moments.title: Happy 47th Birthday, Shane Filan
moments.blurb: Irish singer-songwriter Shane Filan, best known as a member of the iconic boyband Westlife, turns 47 today, July 5th.

angles.name: Boyband Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 47th Birthday to Westlife's very own Shane Filan! What's your favourite Westlife power ballad?

angles.name: Westlife Memories
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Shane Filan! The Westlife star turns 47 today. Which of their hits makes you feel 'Flying Without Wings'?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Remake on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the beloved classic 'Little House on the Prairie' is set to premiere on Netflix on July 9th, bringing the Ingalls family story to a new generation.

angles.name: Nostalgia Watch
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip back in time! The new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation arrives on Netflix this Thursday, July 9th. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: The Ingalls family returns! A fresh take on 'Little House on the Prairie' premieres on Netflix on July 9th. Perfect for some family viewing this summer.

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK - After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix this Sunday, July 12th, catching up with the cast after the pods.

angles.name: Reality Catch-up
angles.copy: What happened after the pods? 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops this Sunday, July 12th on Netflix! Get ready for all the updates.

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Your weekend binge-watch just got sorted! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 is coming to Netflix on July 12th. Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel 'Elle' Streaming Now
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which follows a teenage Elle Woods, premiered on Prime Video on July 1st and is now available to stream.

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: Omigod you guys! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series 'Elle' is NOW STREAMING on Prime Video! Have you caught up with teenage Elle Woods yet?

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Your weekend watch list just got pinker! 'Elle', the 'Legally Blonde' prequel, dropped on Prime Video on July 1st. Time for a binge-watch!

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026 Cancellation Aftermath
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival 2026, scheduled for July 10-12 in London, was cancelled in April after its sole headliner, Ye, was denied entry to the UK, sparking wider debate about the festival industry.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: Remember Wireless Festival 2026? It would have been happening next weekend, but was cancelled in April. Still a big talking point in the UK festival scene.

angles.name: London Festival Gap
angles.copy: With Wireless Festival 2026 not happening, London's festival calendar has a gap next weekend. What are your favourite urban music festivals?

moments.title: The Open Championship Build-Up Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, taking place July 16-19, kicks off its practice days this Sunday, July 12th, with fans able to attend a Last-Chance Qualifier and other events.

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: The countdown to The Open is on! Practice days begin this Sunday, July 12th, at Royal Birkdale. Are you excited for golf's original championship?

angles.name: Merseyside Golf
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is getting ready! The Open Championship practice days start this Sunday. Who do you think will lift the Claret Jug next week?
